title: What Is My IP - Check Your Public IP Address
error: Could not detect IP. Check your connection.
seoDescription: Free online What Is My IP tool. Instantly check your public IPv4 and IPv6 address, ISP, and approximate location. No signup required, works instantly in your browser.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the IP Address Checker
step1Desc: Navigate to this page. Your public IP address is automatically detected and displayed at the top. No clicking needed.
step2Desc: Click the Copy button next to your IP address to copy it to your clipboard. Share it with your network administrator or use it for remote access setup.
step3Desc: Check your approximate location, ISP, and network info below the IP address. Click Check Again to refresh the data anytime.
feature1: Instant IP detection — no click needed
use1: Check your public IP for remote desktop setup
faq1Q: What is a public IP address?
faq1A: A public IP address is a unique number assigned by your ISP that identifies your device on the internet. It is how websites and services know where to send data back to you.
faq2Q: Is my IP address visible to websites?
faq2A: Yes — every website you visit can see your public IP address. This tool simply shows you what those websites see.
faq3Q: What is the difference between IPv4 and IPv6?
faq3A: IPv4 uses a 32-bit format (e.g., 192.168.1.1) while IPv6 uses 128-bit hex format (e.g., 2001:db8::1). The world is gradually transitioning to IPv6 as IPv4 addresses run out.
